name: Erin

skills.name: Elf Dance
skills.description:
Her Basic Attack grants Energy. At max Energy, she speeds up, gains a stack of Laurel, and enhances her next Basic Attack.
The speed-up increases with her Magical Attack.
Her Pierce and Lifesteal stats are linked, using whichever is higher.

skills.name: Dance - Leaf Greeting
skills.description:
Shoots a leaf to deal damage and gain marks. The leaf then forms a circle, damaging and slowing enemies.
Magical Attack reduces the skill's cooldown.

skills.name: Twirl - Forest Whisper
skills.description: Recovers full Energy and gains marks, immunity to slow, and Attack Speed.

skills.name: Waltz - Laurel Bloom
skills.description: This skill is unlocked when Erin gains enough Laurels. She consumes Laurels to deal damage and gain Movement Speed, while reducing the cooldown of Skill 2.

skillsZh.name: 精靈舞步
skillsZh.description:
艾琳普攻造成傷害並獲得能量，能量充盈後可獲得加速效果和一層月桂印記並強化下一次普攻。
艾琳的法術攻擊越高，加速效果提高的移動速度越快。
艾琳的穿透/吸血為全能穿透/吸血，取物理穿透/吸血和法術穿透/吸血的較大者。

skillsZh.name: 葉舞・致意
skillsZh.description:
艾琳射出葉子造成傷害並獲得印記，葉子隨後展開成環，對目標造成傷害和減速效果。
法強可以減少冷卻。

skillsZh.name: 旋舞・輕語
skillsZh.description: 艾琳回滿能量並獲得印記，免疫減速並強化自身攻速。

skillsZh.name: 月桂之舞・盛放
skillsZh.description: 艾琳印記層數達標後解鎖此技能，施放技能消耗印記造成傷害並加速自身，同時減少2技能冷卻。

tips: Build: Ardent Dominion, Savant's Wrath, Void Staff.
tipsZh: 艾琳（發育路）：梯度 S，勝率 50.77%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：熾熱支配、博學者之怒、虛無法杖.

patchHistory.change: Increased Skill 1's damage and Physical Defense.
patchHistory.detail: During the 'I'm a dev for HoK!' event in Honor of Kings Camp, there were many calls to buff Erin, so we have increased her viability in the early game.
Erin can explore both physical and magic equipment. We're improving her base stats to ensure she remains strong under different playstyles.

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升1技能傷害和物理防禦
patchHistoryZh.detail: 「在HOK CAMP的活動『我在HOK當企劃活動中』加強艾琳的呼聲很高，因此本次我們提升了她前期的對抗能力。」
「艾琳可以探索物理或法術出裝，我們提高她的基礎屬性，希望保證她在不同流派下的基礎強度。」

faqs.question: Is Erin good in current season?
faqs.answer: Erin is Tier S Marksman with 50.77% win rate, 1.79% pick rate, and 0.16% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Erin build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Ardent Dominion, Savant's Wrath, Void Staff, Splendor, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.

faqs.question: How to counter Erin?
faqs.answer: Pick Dun. Strong into Ying, Han Xin, Lam.

faqsZh.question: 艾琳 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 艾琳 為 S 梯度，勝率 50.77%、選取 1.79%、禁用 0.16%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 艾琳 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：熾熱支配、博學者之怒、虛無法杖、輝月、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 艾琳？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Dun。艾琳 克制 Ying、Han Xin、Lam。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Ying, Han Xin, Lam. Weak into: Dun.

guide.overview: Erin is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 51.5% win rate and 1.5% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Erin: Her Basic Attack grants Energy.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Golden Blade, Boots of the Arcane, Savant's Wrath, then complete Staves of Sorcery, Void Staff. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Red for stats that match Erin's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Dance - Leaf Greeting → Twirl - Forest Whisper → Waltz - Laurel Bloom → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Waltz - Laurel Bloom (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Dance - Leaf Greeting is your lane trade tool. Twirl - Forest Whisper second. Waltz - Laurel Bloom whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Dance - Leaf Greeting → Twirl - Forest Whisper → Waltz - Laurel Bloom → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Erin is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.5% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Erin.
comparisons: Erin vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Erin has +2.2% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Erin when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Erin vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Erin has +1.5% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Erin when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Erin excels into Ying, Han Xin, Lam. Avoid blind picking into Dun without team peel.
